sentence: After many rounds of cell division, the individual develops into a complex, multicellular organism, as seen in this mature sea urchin.

3. Cell division causes a complex organism. (Causation sensor)
4. Cell division leads to differentiation. (Causation sensor)
5. This event occurred in this mature sea urchin. (Temporal sensor, exact substring match)
These claims meet the rules and are supported by the source sentence.
